pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17.
Change the Maven groupId, artifactId, and finalName to reflect a new project identity.
Add the standard JSTL API dependency for JSP standard tag library support.
Add the Apache Taglibs Standard implementation dependency to provide runtime support for JSTL.
Set the scope of the javax.annotation-api dependency to 'provided' to avoid packaging conflicts with the container.
Add the Google Gson library for JSON serialization and deserialization.
Add the Log4j Core library for logging capabilities.
Explicitly configure the Maven WAR plugin version to ensure consistent build behavior.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the bin directory to the gitignore file to prevent binary or generated files from being tracked.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Rename the web application display name to reflect the technology stack.
Add a new context parameter for admin password configuration.
Update error page locations to point to new slide directories.
Change the JNDI name of the JDBC resource reference.
Update comments to reference new slide numbers.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Reorganize the index page links into categorized lists and update URLs to reflect a new module numbering scheme.
src/main/webapp/index.html.human_impl: Replaced flat div list with grouped ul/li elements and updated hrefs from s07/s08 to s02/s03 etc.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Update the HTML title, add a favicon, and include a CSS stylesheet for better presentation.
src/main/webapp/index.html.human_impl: Changed title to 'Java EE Servlet', added link to simple.css and a base64 favicon.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Define a base URL for the application to ensure relative links resolve correctly.
src/main/webapp/index.html.human_impl: Added <base href="/jees/"> to the head section.
